mapper.sql: id, order_id, order_item, split_no, pco_item, split_type, warehouse_code, modelno, wm_order_id, qty, qty_in, qty_out, wl_date, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.order_status
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.order_status (id, order_id, order_item, split_no, pco_item, split_type, warehouse_code, modelno, wm_order_id, qty, qty_in, qty_out, wl_date, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{splitType,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

id,
order_id,
order_item,

mapper.update:
update dbo.order_status
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=CHAR},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_in = #{record.qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_out = #{record.qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.order_status set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{record.orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{record.splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_item = #{record.pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_type = #{record.splitType,jdbcType=CHAR}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wm_order_id = #{record.wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_in = #{record.qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_out = #{record.qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wl_date = #{record.wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.order_status
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER},
split_type = #{splitType,jdbcType=CHAR},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
wm_order_id = #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_in = #{qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER},
qty_out = #{qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wl_date = #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update dbo.order_status set order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, order_item = #{orderItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_no = #{splitNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pco_item = #{pcoItem,jdbcType=INTEGER}, split_type = #{splitType,jdbcType=CHAR}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modelno = #{modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, wm_order_id = #{wmOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_in = #{qtyIn,jdbcType=INTEGER}, qty_out = #{qtyOut,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wl_date = #{wlDate,jdbcType=DATE}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
